title: Tiara Tahiti
writer: Geoffrey Cotterell, Ivan Foxwell, Mordecai Richler
actors: James Mason, John Mills, Claude Dauphin
plot: James Mason and Sir John Mills star in this comedy-drama about a tough Colonel and a refined Captain who clashed during the war and continue their personal battle in peacetime Tahiti.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
